title: Resolve establishing a special commission to review Department of Developmental Services regulations and practices

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Vieira of Falmouth, a petition (accompanied by resolve, House, No. 292) of David T. Vieira for legislation to establish a special commission (including members of the General Court) to review Department of Developmental Services regulations and practices.  Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities

related_entities.name: committee on Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities
